title: German-Style Bao Cream Biscuit Dessert
description: A unique dessert that combines German and Southeast Asian flavors, featuring soft bao and a sweet cream biscuit topping.
instructions: 2. Cut the biscuits into quarters and toast until lightly browned.
3. Split the bao into halves horizontally.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the sweetened cream until stiff peaks form.
5. Spoon the whipped cream onto each bao half.
6. Place a toasted biscuit quarter on top of the cream.
7. Drizzle with a bit of sugar and sprinkle crushed Oreos on top.
8. Garnish with a Malaysian sugar cookie biscuit if desired.
